items.title: MyWhoosh
items.description: Virtual cycling platform — indoor racing, training and events built on Unreal Engine.
details: Implemented new features to enhance overall user experience and product quality.
Designed and architected scalable systems aligned with production requirements.
Conducted R&D to improve performance, stability, and development workflows.
Collaborated closely with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality features.

items.title: Maelstrom
items.description: Grim fantasy meets thunderous naval combat. Captain an Orc, Dwarf, or Human warship in online multiplayer.
details: Grim fantasy combined with thunderous naval combat in a vibrant, monster-saturated world.
Captain an Orc, Dwarf, or Human warship and sail the turbulent Abyssal Ocean.
Online multiplayer with free-for-all and team-based matches.

items.title: StrayShot
items.description: Third-person battle royale shooter with high-quality graphics and fast-paced mechanics — solo & squad.
details: Third-person shooter throwing you into heart-pounding battle royale action.
Stunning environments with high-quality graphics and fast-paced shooter mechanics.
Suitable for both squad-based and solo play — only the strongest survive.

items.title: Art Gallery
items.description: Exclusive Virtua Art Gallery — explore digital art in a way you've never experienced before.
details: Explore digital art in a way you've never experienced before.
An exclusive Virtua Art Gallery built in Unreal Engine.

items.title: Fancave
items.description: Customizable Fancave for digital collectibles — plus the futuristic Virtua Dome for bigger items.
details: Display your incredible digital collectibles within your very own customizable Fancave.
For bigger collectibles, take advantage of the insane futuristic Virtua Dome.
